metadata.description: Claude Code and Codex plugins by Sour Old Geezer: skills for code auditing, review, and development workflows, with Claude Code subagents and Codex metadata where supported.

plugins.name: souroldgeezer-audit
plugins.description: Rubric-driven audits for DevSecOps posture and test quality, with per-stack extensions, matching Claude Code subagents, and Codex skill metadata.

plugins.name: souroldgeezer-design
plugins.description: Reference-driven design skills for sustainable software, web frontend application design, HTTP APIs, and infrastructure. Covers code/module/script boundaries and dependencies including .NET™, Java™, Rust®, shell, and Python® tooling, app routes/screens/component architecture/state/data/rendering/responsive/accessibility/performance posture, HTTP API design with Azure® Functions™ runtime, Node.js® hosted/serverless and hosted Next.js™ runtime extensions, Azure® Cosmos DB™ / Azure® Blob Storage™ data extensions, infrastructure/IaC design with Azure®, Terraform™, and Bicep™ extensions, matching Claude Code subagents, and Codex skill metadata.

plugins.name: souroldgeezer-architecture
plugins.description: Reference-driven ArchiMate® architecture modeling for enterprise, solution, and application architectures. Covers Architecture IR YAML working packages, OEF XML import/export, build/extract/review/render/lookup, canonical-path drift detection, .NET™ / Bicep™ / workflow lifting, packaged Java™ layout validation, route repair, global polish, generated layout evidence, rendered PNG validation, external validation handoff, per-view readiness, render-contract disclosure, matching Claude Code subagent, and Codex skill metadata.

plugins.name: souroldgeezer-ops
plugins.description: Operations skills for issue, work-item, and pull-request lifecycle handling, with provider-agnostic cores and provider-specific extensions.
